#project: joo-migrator — SQL schema migrations for joo projects: versioned up/down migrations under resources/migrations, profile-aware metadata, transactional batches, lock + history tables, automatic (in-app) and manual (CLI) modes
#deps-note: sigs.k8s.io/yaml backs the .yml metadata (joo-native parser planned as its replacement); modernc.org/sqlite is the built-in dev/test dialect driver — MySQL and PostgreSQL drivers are provided by the consuming project
